title: 「Otherwise / Or」句型
titleEn: Using Otherwise / Or to express consequences

omissions: The English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits content are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Required action or condition. Otherwise, + subject + result or consequence.

formulas.formula: Required action or condition. Otherwise, + subject + result or consequence.
Required action or condition, or + subject + result or consequence.

example: We had better finish work earlier. Otherwise, we may need to work overtime.
exampleZh: 我們最好早點完成工作，否則可能要加班。

examples.en: We had better finish work earlier. Otherwise, we may need to work overtime.
examples.zh: 我們最好早點完成工作，否則可能要加班。
examples.highlight: Otherwise, we may need to work overtime

examples.en: We had better finish work earlier, or we may need to work overtime.
examples.zh: 我們最好早點完成工作，否則可能要加班。
examples.highlight: or we may need to work overtime

meaning.zh: 如果第一個行動或條件沒有發生，第二個結果便可能或將會發生。

rules.en: The first part usually states an action that should be completed: advice, an instruction, a requirement, a necessary condition or a way to avoid a problem.
rules.zh: 第一部分通常提出應該完成的行動，例如建議、指示、要求、必要條件或避免問題的方法。
examples: You should save the document. Otherwise, you may lose your work.

rules.en: In the use taught here, otherwise normally begins a new sentence: put a full stop before it and a comma after it. Do not join two complete sentences with only a comma.
rules.zh: 在本課教授的用法中，otherwise 前面通常使用句號，otherwise 後面使用逗號；兩個完整句子不應只用逗號連接。
examples: Check the address again. Otherwise, the parcel may go to the wrong place.

rules.en: Or joins the two parts in one sentence. When the first part is an instruction, the subject you is normally omitted.
rules.zh: Or 把兩個部分連成一句。如果第一部分是指令句，主語 you 通常不會寫出來。
examples: Hurry, or you will miss the bus.

rules.en: Preserve the possibility and strength of the result. Normally keep the modal verb used in the question, such as may, might, could, will, cannot or would have.
rules.zh: 保留結果的可能性和強度。題目使用哪一個情態動詞，答案通常便要保留哪一個，例如 may、might、could、will、cannot 或 would have。

rules.en: In this lesson, or means ‘otherwise’, not a choice between alternatives.
rules.zh: Or 在本課表示「否則」，不是表示選擇的「或者」。
examples: Would you like tea or coffee?

rules.en: In this lesson, otherwise means ‘if this does not happen’, not ‘in other respects’.
rules.zh: 本課只練習 otherwise 表示「如果不是這樣，便會……」的用法，不是表示「在其他方面」。
examples: The room is small but otherwise comfortable.

benefits.en: It clearly explains the consequence of not taking an action.
benefits.zh: 清楚說明不採取行動的後果。

benefits.en: It shortens an if...not sentence and makes the message more direct.
benefits.zh: 把 if...not 的句子縮短，令表達更直接。

benefits.en: It is useful for reminders, advice and warnings in everyday, school, safety and workplace contexts.
benefits.zh: 適合提出日常提醒、建議和警告，也可用於課堂指示、安全規則、工作電郵、操作說明和公共告示。

benefits.en: It makes the cause-and-effect relationship easier to understand.
benefits.zh: 讓因果關係更容易理解。

benefits.en: Otherwise and or provide different rhythms and help avoid repeatedly using if you do not.
benefits.zh: Otherwise 和 or 提供兩種不同的表達節奏，並可避免反覆使用 if you do not。

sourceOmissions: The PDF supplies Chinese-only explanations for most Important Rules and Benefits; their English versions are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using otherwise or or to express what may happen if the first action or condition is not followed.
Use otherwise for odd-numbered questions. Use or for even-numbered questions.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 otherwise 或 or 改寫以下句子，以表達沒有完成第一項行動或條件時可能出現的後果。
單數題使用 otherwise；雙數題使用 or。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: You should take an umbrella because you may get wet if you do not.
questions.promptZh: 你應該帶雨傘，因為如果不帶，你可能會淋濕。
questions.answer: You should take an umbrella. Otherwise, you may get wet.
questions.answerZh: 你應該帶雨傘，否則可能會淋濕。
questions.highlight: You should take an umbrella. Otherwise, you may get wet.

questions.prompt: If you do not hurry, you will miss the bus.
questions.promptZh: 如果你不快點，便會錯過巴士。
questions.answer: Hurry, or you will miss the bus.
questions.answerZh: 快一點，否則你會錯過巴士。
questions.highlight: Hurry, or you will miss the bus.

questions.prompt: Mia needs to charge her phone because it may run out of power if she does not.
questions.promptZh: 米婭需要為手機充電，因為如果不充電，手機可能會沒電。
questions.answer: Mia needs to charge her phone. Otherwise, it may run out of power.
questions.answerZh: 米婭需要為手機充電，否則手機可能會沒電。
questions.highlight: Mia needs to charge her phone. Otherwise, it may run out of power.

questions.prompt: Keep the milk in the fridge. If you do not, it may go bad.
questions.promptZh: 把牛奶放在雪櫃裏。如果不這樣做，牛奶可能會變壞。
questions.answer: Keep the milk in the fridge, or it may go bad.
questions.answerZh: 把牛奶放在雪櫃裏，否則牛奶可能會變壞。
questions.highlight: Keep the milk in the fridge, or it may go bad.

questions.prompt: We had better leave home now because we may be late if we do not.
questions.promptZh: 我們最好現在離開家，因為如果不走，可能會遲到。
questions.answer: We had better leave home now. Otherwise, we may be late.
questions.answerZh: 我們最好現在離開家，否則可能會遲到。
questions.highlight: We had better leave home now. Otherwise, we may be late.

questions.prompt: If you do not read the instructions, you may make a mistake.
questions.promptZh: 如果你不閱讀指示，可能會犯錯。
questions.answer: Read the instructions, or you may make a mistake.
questions.answerZh: 閱讀指示，否則你可能會犯錯。
questions.highlight: Read the instructions, or you may make a mistake.

questions.prompt: Leo should save his document because he could lose his work if he does not.
questions.promptZh: 里奧應該儲存文件，因為如果不儲存，他可能會失去已完成的工作。
questions.answer: Leo should save his document. Otherwise, he could lose his work.
questions.answerZh: 里奧應該儲存文件，否則他可能會失去已完成的工作。
questions.highlight: Leo should save his document. Otherwise, he could lose his work.

questions.prompt: If you do not wear a coat, you may feel cold outside.
questions.promptZh: 如果你不穿外套，在外面可能會感到寒冷。
questions.answer: Wear a coat, or you may feel cold outside.
questions.answerZh: 穿上外套，否則你在外面可能會感到寒冷。
questions.highlight: Wear a coat, or you may feel cold outside.

questions.prompt: The plants need to be watered today because they may dry out if they are not.
questions.promptZh: 這些植物今天需要澆水，因為如果不澆水，它們可能會枯乾。
questions.answer: The plants need to be watered today. Otherwise, they may dry out.
questions.answerZh: 這些植物今天需要澆水，否則可能會枯乾。
questions.highlight: The plants need to be watered today. Otherwise, they may dry out.

questions.prompt: You should set an alarm. If you do not, you might oversleep.
questions.promptZh: 你應該設定鬧鐘。如果不這樣做，你可能會睡過頭。
questions.answer: Set an alarm, or you might oversleep.
questions.answerZh: 設定鬧鐘，否則你可能會睡過頭。
questions.highlight: Set an alarm, or you might oversleep.

questions.prompt: Sarah must submit the form today. If she fails to do so, her application may be delayed.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉必須在今天提交表格。如果她未能這樣做，她的申請可能會被延誤。
questions.answer: Sarah must submit the form today. Otherwise, her application may be delayed.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉必須在今天提交表格，否則她的申請可能會被延誤。
questions.highlight: Sarah must submit the form today. Otherwise, her application may be delayed.

questions.prompt: We should book the tickets soon because there may be no seats left if we wait.
questions.promptZh: 我們應該盡快預訂門票，因為如果再等下去，可能會沒有剩餘座位。
questions.answer: We should book the tickets soon, or there may be no seats left.

questions.prompt: Why should Ben check the address again? If he does not, he may send the parcel to the wrong place.
questions.promptZh: 本為甚麼應該再次核對地址？如果不核對，他可能會把包裹寄到錯誤的地方。
questions.answer: Ben should check the address again. Otherwise, he may send the parcel to the wrong place.
questions.answerZh: 本應該再次核對地址，否則可能會把包裹寄到錯誤的地方。

questions.prompt: You need to stir the soup because it may burn if you leave it still.
questions.promptZh: 你需要攪拌湯，因為如果一直不攪拌，湯可能會燒焦。
questions.answer: Stir the soup, or it may burn.
questions.answerZh: 攪拌湯，否則湯可能會燒焦。

questions.prompt: The class must remain quiet. If the class becomes noisy, the other students cannot concentrate.
questions.promptZh: 全班必須保持安靜。如果課室變得嘈吵，其他學生便不能集中精神。

questions.highlight: The class must remain quiet. Otherwise, the other students cannot concentrate.

questions.prompt: Unless you check the train time, you may arrive after the last train has left.
questions.promptZh: 除非你查看火車時間，否則你到達時尾班車可能已經開出。
questions.answer: Check the train time, or you may arrive after the last train has left.

questions.highlight: Check the train time, or you may arrive after the last train has left.

questions.prompt: Chloe should bring her student card. Without it, she cannot enter the library.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊應該帶學生證。沒有學生證，她便不能進入圖書館。
questions.answer: Chloe should bring her student card. Otherwise, she cannot enter the library.

questions.prompt: You must keep the door closed because the dog may run outside if you leave it open.
questions.promptZh: 你必須把門關好，因為如果把門打開，狗隻可能會跑到外面。
questions.answer: Keep the door closed, or the dog may run outside.

questions.highlight: Keep the door closed, or the dog may run outside.

questions.prompt: We need to buy enough food today. If we do not, we will have nothing to cook tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 我們今天需要購買足夠的食物。如果不買，明天便沒有東西可以烹煮。
questions.answer: We need to buy enough food today. Otherwise, we will have nothing to cook tomorrow.

questions.prompt: Why must Noah wear safety glasses? His eyes could be hurt if he does not.

questions.answer: Noah must wear safety glasses, or his eyes could be hurt.

questions.highlight: Noah must wear safety glasses, or his eyes could be hurt.

questions.prompt: All files should be backed up. If this is not done, important information may be lost.
questions.promptZh: 所有文件都應該備份。如果沒有備份，重要資料可能會遺失。
questions.answer: All files should be backed up. Otherwise, important information may be lost.

questions.prompt: The nurse must check the patient’s name before giving the medicine. If she does not, she may give it to the wrong person.

questions.prompt: Daniel needs to leave at six. If he leaves later, he will not reach the airport on time.

questions.prompt: You should copy the important photos to another device. Without a copy, you could lose them all.

questions.prompt: The manager must explain the changes clearly. If she does not, the staff may misunderstand the new procedure.
questions.promptZh: 經理必須清楚解釋有關改動。如果不清楚解釋，員工可能會誤解新程序。
questions.answer: The manager must explain the changes clearly. Otherwise, the staff may misunderstand the new procedure.
questions.answerZh: 經理必須清楚解釋有關改動，否則員工可能會誤解新程序。
questions.highlight: The manager must explain the changes clearly. Otherwise, the staff may misunderstand the new procedure.

questions.prompt: Residents must separate paper from other rubbish because it cannot be recycled properly if they do not.
questions.promptZh: 居民必須把紙張和其他垃圾分開，因為如果不這樣做，紙張便不能被妥善回收。
questions.answer: Residents must separate paper from other rubbish, or it cannot be recycled properly.
questions.answerZh: 居民必須把紙張和其他垃圾分開，否則紙張便不能被妥善回收。

questions.prompt: Aisha should write down the appointment time. If she relies only on her memory, she may forget it.
questions.promptZh: 艾莎應該記下預約時間。如果只依靠記憶，她可能會忘記。
questions.answer: Aisha should write down the appointment time. Otherwise, she may forget it.
questions.answerZh: 艾莎應該記下預約時間，否則可能會忘記。
questions.highlight: Aisha should write down the appointment time. Otherwise, she may forget it.

questions.prompt: You must not touch the paintings because you could damage them.

questions.answer: Do not touch the paintings, or you could damage them.

questions.answer: The school needs to repair the broken gate. Otherwise, children could enter the road.

questions.prompt: You should keep the receipt because the shop may refuse a refund without it.
questions.promptZh: 你應該保留收據，因為沒有收據，商店可能會拒絕退款。
questions.answer: Keep the receipt, or the shop may refuse a refund.

questions.prompt: Grace took a map with her. If she had not taken it, she might have got lost.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲隨身帶了地圖。如果她沒有帶地圖，便可能已經迷路。

questions.prompt: The recipe says that you must measure the flour carefully because the cake may become too dry if you use too much.

questions.prompt: The council must clear the blocked drains before the storm. If it does not, nearby streets may flood.
questions.promptZh: 市議會必須在暴風雨來臨前清理淤塞的排水渠。如果不清理，附近街道可能會水浸。
questions.answer: The council must clear the blocked drains before the storm. Otherwise, nearby streets may flood.
questions.answerZh: 市議會必須在暴風雨來臨前清理淤塞的排水渠，否則附近街道可能會水浸。

questions.prompt: You must speak clearly during the online meeting because people may misunderstand you if your voice is unclear.
questions.promptZh: 你在網上會議中必須清楚說話，因為如果聲音不清楚，其他人可能會誤解你的意思。
questions.answer: Speak clearly during the online meeting, or people may misunderstand you.
questions.answerZh: 在網上會議中清楚說話，否則其他人可能會誤解你的意思。
questions.highlight: Speak clearly during the online meeting, or people may misunderstand you.

questions.prompt: Maya saved the booking confirmation on her phone. Without it, she might have had trouble checking in.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅把預訂確認文件儲存在手機中。沒有這份文件，她辦理登記手續時可能會遇到困難。
questions.answer: Maya saved the booking confirmation on her phone. Otherwise, she might have had trouble checking in.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅把預訂確認文件儲存在手機中，否則她辦理登記手續時可能會遇到困難。
questions.highlight: Maya saved the booking confirmation on her phone. Otherwise, she might have had trouble checking in.

questions.prompt: The driver should slow down near the school because he may not be able to stop in time if a child steps into the road.
questions.promptZh: 司機駛近學校時應該減速，因為如果有兒童走出馬路，他可能無法及時停車。
questions.answer: The driver should slow down near the school, or he may not be able to stop in time if a child steps into the road.
questions.answerZh: 司機駛近學校時應該減速，否則如果有兒童走出馬路，他可能無法及時停車。
questions.highlight: The driver should slow down near the school, or he may not be able to stop in time if a child steps into the road.

questions.prompt: The hospital should keep emergency exits clear at all times. If it fails to do so, people may not be able to leave quickly during an emergency.
questions.promptZh: 醫院應該時刻保持緊急出口暢通。如果未能這樣做，發生緊急事故時，人們可能無法迅速離開。
questions.answer: The hospital should keep emergency exits clear at all times. Otherwise, people may not be able to leave quickly during an emergency.
questions.answerZh: 醫院應該時刻保持緊急出口暢通，否則發生緊急事故時，人們可能無法迅速離開。
questions.highlight: The hospital should keep emergency exits clear at all times. Otherwise, people may not be able to leave quickly during an emergency.

questions.prompt: Parents must return the signed consent form by Friday. If they do not, their child may not be allowed to join the trip.
questions.promptZh: 家長必須在星期五前交回已簽署的同意書。如果沒有交回，子女可能不獲准參加旅行。
questions.answer: Parents must return the signed consent form by Friday, or their child may not be allowed to join the trip.
questions.answerZh: 家長必須在星期五前交回已簽署的同意書，否則子女可能不獲准參加旅行。
questions.highlight: Parents must return the signed consent form by Friday, or their child may not be allowed to join the trip.

questions.prompt: The customer service team should record every complaint accurately. If details are missing, the next member of staff may not understand the problem.
questions.promptZh: 顧客服務團隊應該準確記錄每宗投訴。如果資料有所遺漏，下一名職員可能無法了解問題。
questions.answer: The customer service team should record every complaint accurately. Otherwise, the next member of staff may not understand the problem.
questions.answerZh: 顧客服務團隊應該準確記錄每宗投訴，否則下一名職員可能無法了解問題。
questions.highlight: The customer service team should record every complaint accurately. Otherwise, the next member of staff may not understand the problem.

questions.prompt: The laboratory staff must label every sample clearly because an unlabelled sample could be confused with another one.
questions.promptZh: 實驗室職員必須清楚標示每個樣本，因為沒有標籤的樣本可能會與另一個樣本混淆。
questions.answer: The laboratory staff must label every sample clearly, or it could be confused with another one.
questions.answerZh: 實驗室職員必須清楚標示每個樣本，否則樣本可能會與另一個樣本混淆。
questions.highlight: The laboratory staff must label every sample clearly, or it could be confused with another one.

questions.prompt: The organisers tested the sound system before the event. If they had not done so, the audience might not have heard the speakers clearly.
questions.promptZh: 主辦單位在活動前測試了音響系統。如果他們沒有測試，觀眾可能無法清楚聽到講者的聲音。
questions.answer: The organisers tested the sound system before the event. Otherwise, the audience might not have heard the speakers clearly.
questions.answerZh: 主辦單位在活動前測試了音響系統，否則觀眾可能無法清楚聽到講者的聲音。
questions.highlight: The organisers tested the sound system before the event. Otherwise, the audience might not have heard the speakers clearly.

questions.prompt: Staff should lock confidential papers in a cabinet because an unauthorised person may read them if they do not.
questions.promptZh: 職員應該把機密文件鎖在文件櫃內，因為如果不這樣做，未經授權的人可能會閱讀文件。
questions.answer: Staff should lock confidential papers in a cabinet, or an unauthorised person may read them.
questions.answerZh: 職員應該把機密文件鎖在文件櫃內，否則未經授權的人可能會閱讀文件。
questions.highlight: Staff should lock confidential papers in a cabinet, or an unauthorised person may read them.

questions.prompt: The school must explain the new dismissal arrangements to families in advance. If it does not, some parents may arrive at the wrong gate.
questions.promptZh: 學校必須預先向家長解釋新的放學安排。如果沒有解釋，部分家長可能會前往錯誤的校門。
questions.answer: The school must explain the new dismissal arrangements to families in advance. Otherwise, some parents may arrive at the wrong gate.
questions.answerZh: 學校必須預先向家長解釋新的放學安排，否則部分家長可能會前往錯誤的校門。
questions.highlight: The school must explain the new dismissal arrangements to families in advance. Otherwise, some parents may arrive at the wrong gate.

questions.prompt: The maintenance team must inspect the lift regularly because a small fault may become a serious safety problem if it is ignored.
questions.promptZh: 維修團隊必須定期檢查升降機，因為如果小故障受到忽視，便可能變成嚴重的安全問題。
questions.answer: The maintenance team must inspect the lift regularly, or a small fault may become a serious safety problem.
questions.answerZh: 維修團隊必須定期檢查升降機，否則小故障可能會變成嚴重的安全問題。
questions.highlight: The maintenance team must inspect the lift regularly, or a small fault may become a serious safety problem.

questions.prompt: The project team agreed on one version of the timetable. If they had continued using different versions, several tasks might have been scheduled for the wrong dates.
questions.promptZh: 項目團隊同意使用同一版本的時間表。如果他們繼續使用不同版本，數項工作可能會被安排在錯誤的日期。
questions.answer: The project team agreed on one version of the timetable. Otherwise, several tasks might have been scheduled for the wrong dates.
questions.answerZh: 項目團隊同意使用同一版本的時間表，否則數項工作可能會被安排在錯誤的日期。
questions.highlight: The project team agreed on one version of the timetable. Otherwise, several tasks might have been scheduled for the wrong dates.

questions.prompt: Public service staff must check that translated notices match the original message. If they do not, residents may receive incorrect instructions about what to do.
questions.promptZh: 公共服務人員必須核對翻譯通告是否符合原文。如果不核對，居民可能會收到錯誤的行動指示。
questions.answer: Public service staff must check that translated notices match the original message, or residents may receive incorrect instructions about what to do.
questions.answerZh: 公共服務人員必須核對翻譯通告是否符合原文，否則居民可能會收到錯誤的行動指示。
questions.highlight: Public service staff must check that translated notices match the original message, or residents may receive incorrect instructions about what to do.
